hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); f=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); [ -n "$f" ] && git -C "/Users/a.gharaballi/Desktop/vessel status" add "$f" 2>/dev/null && { git -C "/Users/a.gharaballi/Desktop/vessel status" diff --staged --quiet || { git -C "/Users/a.gharaballi/Desktop/vessel status" commit -m "Update ${f##*/}" 2>/dev/null && git -C "/Users/a.gharaballi/Desktop/vessel status" push origin HEAD 2>/dev/null; VERCEL_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 PATH="$HOME/.node/bin:$PATH" npx vercel --prod --yes --cwd "/Users/a.gharaballi/Desktop/vessel status" 2>/dev/null; }; } || true
